title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 525.060 - Return of writ, how made
text:
525.060.  Return of writ, how made. — The officer serving a writ of attachment shall return all bonds taken by him into court, with the writ, and a statement of the names of all garnishees, together with the day and hour and the places when and where they were respectively summoned.
(RSMo 1939 § 1565) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1401; 1919 § 1851; 1909 § 2418
